title: gladiolus rubellus
intro: Gladiolus rubellus, also known as the red corn lily or Chinese gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus rubellus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
